_comment: BL-525 Slice 1 — informal structural reference for ModelFactory's assignment overlay shape. Not a JSON Schema validator; model_factory_lib.bb is the executable source of truth. Runtime state lives at .swarmforge/model-factory/assignment.json (per-role, written by cold-apply) and .swarmforge/model-factory/quota-state.json (daily-cap exhaustion signals), both gitignored and generated. This directory mirrors swarmforge/model-steward/'s schema+seed layout.

assignment_map._key: role name, e.g. "coder" (must match one of: architect, coder, cleaner, QA, hardender, documenter, specifier)

assignment_entry.agent: string, the agent runtime that launches the role's pane, e.g. "claude", "codex", "aider" — derived from provider, mirrors swarmforge/packs/*.conf window lines
assignment_entry.provider: string, e.g. "anthropic", "openai", "cerebras" — must be Model-Steward-certified for the (role, provider, model) triple unless an explicit uncertified override was used
assignment_entry.policy: one of: cheap | quality — the steering mode that produced this entry
assignment_entry.reason: string, human-readable rationale: which rule selected this candidate and any override/exhaustion exclusions applied

quota_state_entry.exhausted_date: ISO calendar date string (YYYY-MM-DD) the provider's free-daily quota was last observed exhausted, or null if never recorded. A provider is treated as exhausted only when this equals the caller-supplied "today" — Slice 1 never reads the wall clock itself, so acceptance can force any date via --today.

cold_apply_plan.overlay_path: string, path to the written assignment.json overlay
cold_apply_plan.pack: string, the pack name the relaunch plan targets
